offer: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent cash flow projections cause late orders and supplier penalties. We provide cash flow forecasting instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inconsistent cash flow projections leading to late orders and supplier penalties.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
